title: Fracture follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped non-complex fracture identity, pain assessment, and clinician-entered imaging review.
investigations.evidence_extract: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.

investigations.text: Requires structured fracture documentation, image and report continuity, honest information, questions, treatment expectations, rehabilitation, mobilisation, weight-bearing, management-plan communication, and documentation.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped questions, imaging continuity, rehabilitation, management-plan, return, and follow-up documentation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires structured fracture documentation, image and report continuity, honest information, questions, treatment expectations, rehabilitation, mobilisation, weight-bearing, management-plan communication, and documentation.

treatment_and_management.text: Supports selected orthopaedic follow-up, stability review, weight-bearing, cast or fixation context, and return review for non-improving symptoms in specified fracture populations.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports mapped selected weight-bearing, immobilisation, stability, and orthopaedic follow-up documentation.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports selected orthopaedic follow-up, stability review, weight-bearing, cast or fixation context, and return review for non-improving symptoms in specified fracture populations.

additions.text: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.
additions.rationale: Supports mapped non-complex fracture identity, pain assessment, and clinician-entered imaging review.
additions.evidence_extract: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.

additions.text: Supports selected orthopaedic follow-up, stability review, weight-bearing, cast or fixation context, and return review for non-improving symptoms in specified fracture populations.
additions.rationale: Supports mapped selected weight-bearing, immobilisation, stability, and orthopaedic follow-up documentation.
additions.evidence_extract: Supports selected orthopaedic follow-up, stability review, weight-bearing, cast or fixation context, and return review for non-improving symptoms in specified fracture populations.

additions.text: Requires structured fracture documentation, image and report continuity, honest information, questions, treatment expectations, rehabilitation, mobilisation, weight-bearing, management-plan communication, and documentation.
additions.rationale: Supports mapped questions, imaging continuity, rehabilitation, management-plan, return, and follow-up documentation.
additions.evidence_extract: Requires structured fracture documentation, image and report continuity, honest information, questions, treatment expectations, rehabilitation, mobilisation, weight-bearing, management-plan communication, and documentation.

source_limitations: Generic healing status, swelling, neurovascular and cast-tightness signs, surgical wound review, fixed four-to-six-week imaging, and all fracture-site-specific schedules remain unsupported.
The healing-fracture diagnosis label remains clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
